posts.author: culturehousecc (CultureHouse)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In Monday email campaigns, we would like the ability to round the corners of image blocks without custom code.

What are you trying to achieve

The Monday Campaigns template editor allows us to easily round corners for text blocks, but rounding corners for images requires custom HTML. We would like the same built-in corner rounding option that text blocks have to apply to image blocks as well.
